title: FunDinoModpackLite
description: FunDinoModpack, but more lightweight. adds 50~ dinosaurus with fossils and archaeology revivail and adds a very little amount of mods.
body:
## This is a more lightweight version of FunDinoModpack. # ----Info On Mods---- I have removed some of the more unnecessary mods for more performance.
The mods removed in 1.18.2 Forge are:

Format: modname

Cobweb
 Construct Armory updated
 Corn Delight
 Death Chest
 Farmer's Delight
 Polymorph
 FerriteCore
 Harvest with ease
 Iron Chests
 Just Zoom
 Mysterious Mountain Lib
 Ocean's Delight
 Oculus
 Pineapple Delight
 Tinker's Construct
The mods removed in 1.18.2 Fabric are:

Format: modname

Casualness Delight
CTM Refabricated
Dynamic FPS
Forge Config API Port
Gravestones
Harvest with ease
Iris Shaders
Iris/Oculus & Geckolib Compat
Iron Chests: Restocked
Just Zoom
Konkrete
Your Options Shall Be Respected
The mods removed in 1.12.2 are: MixinBootstrap, Mantle, Pams HarvestCraft, Construct's Armory, DeathChest, Tinker's construct, Base metals, Iron chest, MMD lib and MMD OreSpawn.
But some mods were also added. So the mods now are:

So now, the mods in 1.18.2 forge are:

Format: modname

Alternate Current
 Architectury API
 Canary
 Cloth Config API
 CoroUtil
 Cull Less Leaves Reforged
Embeddium
 Embeddium Extra
 Embeddium++
 Entity Culling
 FerriteCore
 Fossils and Archeology: Revival
 Francium
 Fusion
 Geckolib
 Jade
 JourneyMap
 JustZoom
 Ksyxis
 Mobtimizations
 ModernFix
 More Hitboxes
 Neat
 Pluto
 Rechiseled
 Reforgium
 REI
 Smooth Boot
 Starlight
 SuperMartijn642's Config Lib
 SuperMartijn642's Core Lib
 Terrablender
 TexTrue's Embeddium Options
So now, the mods in 1.18.2 fabric are:

Format: modname

Alternate Current
 Architectury API
 Cloth Config API
 C2ME
 CoroUtil
 Cull Less Leaves
 Enhanced Block Entities
 Entity Culling
 FerriteCore
 Fossils and Archeology: Revival
 Fusion (Connected Textures)
 Geckolib
 ImmediatelyFast
 Indium
 Jade
 JourneyMap
 JustZoom
 Krypton
 Ksyxis
 LazyDFU
 Lithium
 Mobtimizations
 ModernFix
 More Culling
 More Hitboxes
 Neat
 Rechiseled
 Reese's Sodium Options
 REI
 Smooth Boot
 Sodium
 Sodium Extra
 Starlight
SuperMartijn642's Config Lib
 SuperMartijn642's Core Lib
 TerraBlender
So now, the mods in 1.12.2 are: Betterfps, Chisel, Connected Textures Mod,Fossils And ArchaeologyRrevival, Hwyla, Ido, Obfuscate, Just EnoughItems, Journeymap, llibrary and Neat
The mod betterfps in this modpack is made by Guichaguri and the curseforge page is https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/betterfps. The mod ido is from this curseforge page: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ido. # ----Playing Info---- I recommend you play this with optifine. The purpose of this modpack is to have an enjoyful experience with Fossils and archaeology revival while being lightweight. the icon is the fossil item from fossils and archaeology revival, and I wrote "LITE" on it. #### if you have a good pc, or dont care about the modpack having good performance, download the normal version of FunDinoModpack https://modrinth.com/modpack/fdm.
